text: Every morning, I wake up at 6:30 and start with a glass of water. After a quick shower, I have a light breakfast of oatmeal and coffee. I leave for work at 8:00 and spend the day at my desk, usually finishing by 5:00 PM. In the late afternoon, I exercise for about 30 minutes—either jogging or doing yoga at home. Evenings are for cooking dinner, reading, or watching a TV show. I try to go to bed by 10:30. This routine helps me stay organized, and I feel more productive when I stick to it consistently.
